name: localcode-studio
description: Local-first Electron workspace for AI-assisted project creation, editing, preview and delivery.

scripts.test:mcp-capabilities: npm run test:mcp-capability-gateway && npm run test:mcp-policy && npm run test:mcp-transports && npm run test:mcp-server-registry && npm run test:mcp-discovery-cache && npm run test:mcp-ipc && npm run test:mcp-external && npm run test:mcp-capability-adapter && npm run test:tools && npm run test:project-terminal && npm run test:project-preview-runtime && npm run test:project-visual-capture && npm run test:project-visual-validation-runtime && npm run test:git-service && SMOKE_SCENARIOS=mcp_structured_edit_persistence,mcp_external_tool_bridge,mcp_external_stdio_visual_bridge,mcp_blueprint_contract_guardian,mcp_blueprint_contract_briefing_matrix node tests/smoke-scenarios.test.js
